body:
Goal: Design and implement a new favicon for the website that instantly communicates heavy metal music and drumming, while remaining clean and recognizable at very small sizes (16x16, 32x32 and 48x48 pixels).

The favicon should:

* Clearly represent metal music and drumming.
* Be simple, bold and highly recognizable even at tiny resolutions.
* Avoid text or intricate details that disappear when scaled down.
* Use a minimal colour palette (preferably monochrome or black/white with one accent colour if needed).
* Match the branding and aesthetic of MetalForge: modern, powerful, dark and premium.
* Explore concepts such as:
    * Drumsticks crossed in a forge/anvil style.
    * A stylised snare drum.
    * A metal-inspired “M” integrated with drumsticks.
    * A drumstick striking a cymbal.
    * A minimalist forge flame combined with a drum icon.
* Avoid clichés such as skulls, flames everywhere or overly aggressive imagery unless they improve recognisability.

Produce 3–5 distinct concepts, explain the rationale behind each, then select the strongest option and generate production-ready assets:

* SVG (master)
* favicon.ico (multi-size)
* PNG versions (16x16, 32x32, 48x48, 180x180, 512x512)

The final favicon should look professional, timeless and immediately associated with metal drumming. Prioritise clarity and recognisability over artistic complexity.
title: Fav-icon
